title: WPHX-015 — Define wrapper-to-Haxe ownership state model
description: Define manifest states for external oracle, temporary bridge/wrapper, scaffolded, Haxe-owned parity candidate, and verified Haxe-owned implementation. Include removal gates so typed compatibility layers do not become the destination.
acceptance_criteria: Manifest schema/docs encode ownership states, temporary wrappers require removal conditions, and smell-fix/refactor policy is reflected in task templates.
notes: Defined ownership states in manifests/schemas/ownership-manifest.schema.json and docs/operations/ownership-state-model.md. Added docs/task-templates/port-slice.md so temporary bridges require removal gates and smell fixes require compatibility evidence. Receipt: receipts/operations/wphx-015-ownership-state-model.v1.json.
close_reason: Verified: ownership schema, operation doc, task template, and receipt define states, temporary bridge removal gates, and smell-fix evidence policy.

title: WPHX-014 — Define HHX/template authoring strategy for WordPress templates
description: Use haxe.elixir.codex, haxe.ruby/RailsHx, and tink_hxx references to decide when WordPress PHP/HTML templates, block markup, admin screens, and Gutenberg TSX-like surfaces should use HHX-style typed inline markup versus external/original template shells.
acceptance_criteria: Documented policy names source references, allowed HHX use cases, escape hatches, fixture gates, and cases that must stay original-path PHP/template shells until linker/template feasibility is proven.
close_reason: accepted: documented HHX/template policy with PhoenixHx, RailsHx, and tink_hxx references plus WordPress-specific allowed/deferred use cases and gates

title: WPHX-013 — Decide and bootstrap GutenbergHX sibling repository protocol
description: Record when and how to create a sibling gutenberghx repo that cross-references wordpress-hx without fragmenting task authority. Include smaller dependent-library policy and cross-repo manifest/Beads conventions.
acceptance_criteria: ADR or operations doc defines trigger criteria, repo relationship, Beads authority, cross-repo references, and small-library split policy before any gutenberghx bootstrap.
notes: Decided not to bootstrap gutenberghx yet. Updated docs/operations/dependent-libraries.md with trigger criteria, repo relationship, single Beads authority, cross-repo lock/receipt flow, parallel workflow, and smaller-library split policy. Receipt: receipts/operations/wphx-013-gutenberghx-protocol.v1.json.
close_reason: Completed WPHX-013 GutenbergHX sibling repository protocol decision.

title: WPHX-010 — Seed Beads epics, issues, external refs, and dependencies
acceptance_criteria: bd ready --json yields only valid ready work.
notes: Validated seeded Beads graph with npm run beads:validate. Result: 28 issues, 28 unique WPHX external refs, 10 ready issues, 6 blocked issues; ready JSON contains only open unblocked WPHX-ref work. Receipt: receipts/operations/wphx-010-beads-graph.v1.json.
close_reason: Completed WPHX-010 Beads graph validation with ready queue evidence.

title: WPHX-012 — Decide release and forward baseline branch policy
acceptance_criteria: ADR accepted and baseline mixing is prevented.
notes: Accepted ADR-002 dual upstream baseline policy. Added manifests/baseline-policy.v1.json and npm run baseline:validate guard in precommit. Policy keeps wp70-release on embedded Gutenberg a2a354cf35e5b69c3330d6c1cfd42d8dc2efb9fd and forward/gutenberg-23.4 on 98a796c8780c480ef7bcfe03c42302d9564d785c with no distro claim. Receipt: receipts/operations/wphx-012-baseline-policy.v1.json.
close_reason: Completed WPHX-012 accepted dual-baseline ADR and precommit validation guard.

title: WPHX-801 — Pin Beads version and initialize the root database
acceptance_criteria: bd --version is locked; root .beads works; no nested active store.
notes: Pinned Beads 0.49.0 via .beads/.local_version and toolchain.lock.json; documented root .beads authority and sibling .beads stores as reference-only in docs/operations/beads.md.
close_reason: Pinned Beads 0.49.0, documented root .beads authority, and recorded bootstrap tool versions.

title: WPHX-802 — Install/review Codex integration and author AGENTS hierarchy
acceptance_criteria: Codex reports expected instruction sources and root guidance remains concise.
notes: Reviewed active root AGENTS.md plus ../opencodehx, ../codex-hxrust, and ../genes precedents. Kept root AGENTS.md concise at 103 lines; added docs/operations/agent-instructions.md and receipt receipts/operations/wphx-802-agent-instructions.v1.json.
close_reason: Verified: docs/operations/agent-instructions.md and receipts/operations/wphx-802-agent-instructions.v1.json record expected instruction sources; root AGENTS.md remains concise at 103 lines.

close_reason: Completed WPHX-006 inventory closure with zero unclassified executable entries.

title: WPHX-004 — Resolve and lock WordPress 7.0 Gutenberg commit/artifact
acceptance_criteria: Core Gutenberg pin is verified against WordPress metadata/build.
notes: Locked WordPress 7.0 embedded Gutenberg baseline in manifests/upstream/wordpress-7.0-gutenberg-baseline.v1.json. WordPress package.json pins gutenberg.sha a2a354cf35e5b69c3330d6c1cfd42d8dc2efb9fd and GHCR repo WordPress/gutenberg/gutenberg-wp-develop-build. Local ../gutenberg contains that commit on origin/wp/7.0. Receipt: receipts/upstream/wphx-004-wordpress-7.0-gutenberg-baseline.v1.json.
close_reason: Verified: WordPress package.json Gutenberg SHA, local Gutenberg commit, GHCR manifest revision, artifact digest, and .gutenberg-hash all match in manifests/upstream/wordpress-7.0-gutenberg-baseline.v1.json.

title: WPHX-003 — Obtain full WordPress 7.0.0 checkout and official distribution
acceptance_criteria: WordPress commit/tag, ZIP checksum, and test presence are recorded.
notes: Locked WordPress 7.0 source and official distribution in manifests/upstream/wordpress-7.0-baseline.v1.json. Source checkout: tag 7.0.0, commit 26b68024931348d267b70e2a29910e1320d0094f, tree f3ad96f2357d2309f64a8d42a5808be502639c70. Official zip: https://wordpress.org/wordpress-7.0.zip, MD5 8460cf21c321ed5ededf0f943027558e, SHA-256 b2b6827eb7b2b51f4610893e1a6ad02466e76fe0a307bd40ca2a8ba821c40d0b. Test presence recorded: phpunit.xml.dist, 1091 PHPUnit test files, 17 E2E files, 34 QUnit files. Receipt: receipts/upstream/wphx-003-wordpress-7.0-baseline.v1.json.
close_reason: Verified: WordPress 7.0 source tag/commit, official distribution checksum, and test presence recorded in manifests/upstream/wordpress-7.0-baseline.v1.json with receipt receipts/upstream/wphx-003-wordpress-7.0-baseline.v1.json.
